name: Mrybova Pidlyva (Mushroom Gravy)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Light Cream OR 1 cup Half And Half
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the stock in a saucepan.
2. Add the mushroom mixture, bringing the mixture to a boil.
3. Add the cream and heat through.
4. Season to taste.
NOTE:
For a thicker gravy, add the cornstarch to a little of the cream and then add to the hot gravy.
Use this gravy with cabbage rolls and roasts. It is also very good over toast points.
